debug_info.goal:
a : Type
inst✝⁷ : Inhabited a
inst✝⁶ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 = x2
inst✝⁵ : Max a
inst✝⁴ : Min a
inst✝³ : LT a
inst✝² : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 < x2
inst✝¹ : LE a
inst✝ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 ≤ x2
k : ℕ
xs : List a
ok : k ≤ xs.length
us vs ws : List a
m : ℕ := us.length
n : ℕ := vs.length
h₁ : k ≤ m
⊢ k ≤ us.length

proof:
have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by
        simpa [m] using h₁
      exact h₂
failed_attempts:
have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by
          dsimp only at *
          linarith
        exact h₂

simpa [m] using h₁)
    else if k ≤ m + n then
      have : k ∈ vs := by sorry
      sorry
    else
      sorry

simpa [m] using h₁)
    else if    h₂ : k ≤ m + n then
      have : m < k := by
        omega
      have : k ≤ m + n := h₂
      have : (k - m) ≤ vs.length := by
        have : vs.length = n := rfl
        omega
      vs[(k - m) - 1]!
    else
      select (k - (m + n)) ws (by
        omega
successful_attempts:
have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by
        simpa [m] using h₁
      exact h₂

have h₂ : k ≤ m := h₁
        have h₃ : m = us.length := rfl
        rw [h₃] at h₂
        exact h₂

have h₂ : m = us.length := rfl
      rw [h₂] at h₁
      exact h₁
